backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing posts with ID, author, content fields, keyword filtering, age gate, and CRUD operations restricted by caller identity.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing each frontend file’s purpose and functionality in the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind base styles and custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application configuring routes, age‑gate protection, global layout, theming, and toast provider.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright, attribution link, and mature‑audience disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with branding, theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout menu.
frontend/src/content/policy.ts: Client‑side content policy containing forbidden keywords, validation function, and policy text snippets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating and caching an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidating queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAgeGate.ts: Hook managing local age‑gate confirmation state with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Defines a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, including loading, logging in, and clearing identities. Wraps AuthClient setup logic and exposes status flags through a custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing, fetching, creating, and deleting posts through the backend actor. Automatically invalidates cached post queries on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind base layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables for the application's color system. Applies global styles for borders and body text/background.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app by mounting it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider. Imports global styles and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AgeGatePage.tsx: Implements an age-verification screen requiring users to confirm they are 18+, displaying disclaimers and policy summaries. Supports decline handling and gated entry via a confirmation checkbox.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Provides a form for authenticated users to create posts, including validation, Internet Identity login fallback, and content policy checks. On success it submits the post and navigates back to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the post feed with loading and error states, offering navigation to create posts and view individual posts. Renders posts with basic metadata and handles empty-feed scenarios.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetailPage.tsx: Displays a post’s details, handles loading and error states, and allows the author to delete the post using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom theme colors, typography, container settings, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, existing features, blocked requests, and notes regarding the mature-content platform's constraints.
